html:
Exclusive to:

The Can of Silly String can be acquired by using a Royal Gallery Key on its display case in the Royal Gallery Exhibit in the Palace or by hammering a Wicker Basket in a Hamlet-compatible world.

It is used to craft the Skyworthy, which lets the player travel from the Hamlet world to either the Constant's mainland or the Shipwrecked world.

The Can of Silly String can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_giftshop_4".

×5

×10

×4

×4

Only available in the world linked with a Hamlet world.
plainText:
Can of Silly String
Object Info
40
Miscellaneous
"trinket_giftshop_4"
Exclusive to:
“Comedy in a can.”
–Wilson
“Hehe. It's so silly.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang can play with it?”
–Wolfgang
“I can no longer be amused by childish things.”
–Wendy
“'SILLY' DOES NOT COMPUTE”
–WX-78
“Preposterous!”
–Wickerbottom
“Pretty silly.”
–Woodie
“Really. Is that necessary?”
–Maxwell
“Incredible! I suspect this canister contains many surprises.”
–Wagstaff
“A tööl öf Löki!”
–Wigfrid
“Haha! Fun!”
–Webber
“Ha!”
–Walani
“Is this really so precious?”
–Warly
“'tis na'tha' hempen rope.”
–Woodlegs
“HA! IT MAKE WILBA LAUGH'DED”
–Wilba
“Twirly Tail Can”
–Wormwood
“It's an inferior Pew-matic.”
–Wheeler
The Can of Silly String can be acquired by using a Royal Gallery Key on its display case in the Royal Gallery Exhibit in the Palace or by hammering a Wicker Basket in a Hamlet-compatible world.
It is used to craft the Skyworthy, which lets the player travel from the Hamlet world to either the Constant's mainland or the Shipwrecked world.
The Can of Silly String can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_giftshop_4".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Can of Silly String có thể thu được bằng cách sử dụng Chìa khóa Phòng trưng bày Hoàng gia trên tủ trưng bày của nó trong Triển lãm Phòng trưng bày Hoàng gia trong Cung điện hoặc bằng cách đập Giỏ đan lát trong thế giới tương thích với Hamlet.
